race.comment: PIPPIE BEACH (6) tough mare who deserves her chance at this level on the limit weight. Beat a handy field over 1500m at Rosehill in BM88 grade and on January 31, and since fitted with a 1030m trial. Can finish over the top of these at the good odds. PINITO (2) Oaks runner-up who returned with a slashing fourth over the unsuitable 1300m in the G2 Millie Fox at Rosehill. Desperate for this trip and further and adept in all conditions. Go close. MOVIN OUT (3) another of the Waller runners who surprised at the big odds with a game first-up head win over 1300m at this track. Raced without luck in this grade last prep and even better placed out to the mile. Don't dismiss. UNLEESHING (5) going nicely through the grades and worth a throw at the stumps after winning well at her last two starts. Fitted with a recent 1030m trial and stays in the mix. POLYMNIA (7) returned good figures first-up over the 1300m. Has a good win in her this time in and look for her late.
